---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability for the QML skills library, exporter, installer, or docs
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the feature request.

## Type of request

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Improved routing / request patterns
- [ ] New exporter or platform support
- [ ] Installer improvement
- [ ] Template / starter code improvement
- [ ] Documentation improvement

## Motivation

Why would this help users of the repository?

## Proposed approach

Describe the expected behavior or structure.

## Affected areas

- `skills/qml/`
- `skills/qml/exporters/`
- `install/`
- `examples/`
- root docs

## Additional context

Optional references, examples, or notes.
